title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: From: Harry / Subject: Website
questions.text: I looked at the website you suggested for our project. The pictures are useful, but some information is five years old. Let’s use it for ideas, but check the facts somewhere else before we write anything.
questions.question: What does Harry think about the website?

options.A: It is useful but should not be fully trusted.
options.B: It has no information for their project.
options.C: It is better than any other website.

questions.explanation: Harry likes some parts but says facts should be checked elsewhere.

questions.heading: Visitors to the Farm
questions.text: Please close gates after you pass through them. Some animals are in nearby fields and may escape onto the road. Visitors are welcome to feed the goats, but only with food bought here.
questions.question: What are visitors asked to do?

options.B: Help keep animals in the correct places.
options.A: Bring food from home for the goats.
options.C: Avoid going into fields near the road.

questions.explanation: Closing gates helps prevent animals from escaping.

questions.heading: Message from Lucas to Maya
questions.text: Maya, the tennis courts are free at four, but only for half an hour. I know that’s short, but it’s better than nothing. Shall we practise serving and leave the match until tomorrow?
questions.question: What is Lucas suggesting?

options.C: They use the limited time for one skill.
options.A: They cancel tennis practice until tomorrow.
options.B: They try to book a court for longer.

questions.explanation: Lucas suggests practising serving because they have limited time.

questions.heading: School Trip Lunches
questions.text: Students who ordered vegetarian lunches should collect green bags from the coach driver. Everyone else should take a blue bag. Please check your name label before eating, as some bags contain nuts.
questions.question: What should students do?

options.A: Make sure they take the correct lunch bag.
options.B: Ask the driver to remove nuts from lunches.
options.C: Share green and blue bags with friends.

questions.explanation: Students must collect the correct bag and check the name label.

questions.heading: Evening Swimming
questions.text: Our evening swim sessions are quieter after 8 p.m. Families with young children are advised to come earlier, as the small pool closes at 7:30. The main pool remains open until 9.
questions.question: What does the advert recommend?

options.B: Some families should visit before the evening is too late.
options.A: Children should use the main pool after 8 p.m.
options.C: All swimming areas close at the same time.

questions.explanation: Families with young children should come earlier because the small pool closes.
